attributes.subject: Thank you for today's mentoring chat
attributes.body: Hi Cecilia, thank you again for taking the time to walk through my feature draft with me today. I left with a lot to think about, especially around focus and structure. If you have a moment later, I'd really appreciate any quick written guidance on what to tackle first in revision.

attributes.subject: Budget copy edits needed
attributes.body: Can you review the revised budget language before noon tomorrow?

attributes.subject: Re: Festival program captions
attributes.body: Thanks, the bilingual captions look great now.
